title: 2026 Oscar Best Film Editing Predictions - Gold Derby Expert Rankings
text: Based on Gold Derby's combined forecasts from experts, editors, and users (updated March 4, 2026): One Battle After Another (Andy Jurgensen) leads at 85.65% - Warner Bros., Director: Paul Thomas Anderson. F1 (Stephen Mirrione) follows at 9.55% - Apple Original Films, Director: Joseph Kosinski, focusing on a Formula One driver mentoring a younger competitor. Sinners (Michael P. Shawver) is at 3.66% - Warner Bros., Director: Ryan Coogler, about twin brothers confronting darkness in their hometown. Marty Supreme (Ronald Bronstein, Josh Safdie) is at 0.91% - A24, Director: Josh Safdie, featuring Timothée Chalamet pursuing greatness against the odds. Sentimental Value (Olivier Bugge Coutté) is at 0.23% - Neon, Director: Joachim Trier, exploring family, memories, and artistic reconciliation. The 98th Academy Awards ceremony airs March 15, 2026.
